parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4000, system: `You are a proposal generator for Knowlogix, an AI and workflow automation company in Charleston SC run by Trae Dantzler. You will receive questionnaire answers from Tim and Jennifer Dasinger. Tim runs UPG Insurance (Medicare/ACA individual insurance). Jennifer runs a Goosehead Insurance franchise (personal lines P&C). They share an office and expenses as a married couple.

Based on their answers, generate a customized HTML proposal email with INLINE STYLES (no CSS classes). The proposal should:
1. Reference their specific answers naturally
2. Address any concerns or blockers they raised
3. Confirm the $500/month retainer with tool savings offset ($137 GHL + phone services = ~$200/mo savings, net new cost ~$300/mo)
4. Include a 90-day timeline customized to their answers
5. Note items that need follow-up or verification
6. Acknowledge billing flexibility (one invoice or separate)

Use colors: charcoal #3a3a3c, orange #f1592a. Font: Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif.
Header: AI & Automation Proposal - Tim & Jennifer Dasinger
End with: Trae Dantzler, Knowlogix, 843-900-4576, tdantzler@knowlogix.com

Return ONLY the HTML. No markdown, no backticks, no explanation.`, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate a customized proposal based on these questionnaire answers:\n\n' + JSON.stringify($json.body.answers, null, 2) }] }) }}

parameters.subject: REVIEW: Proposal for Tim & Jennifer Dasinger
parameters.bodyContent:
={{ '
' + '
' + '

Proposal Ready for Your Review

' + '

Tim & Jennifer Dasinger | Generated from questionnaire

' + '
' + '

The questionnaire has been submitted and a customized proposal was generated. Review below, then approve or edit.

' + '
' + 'Approve & Send' + 'Edit in Claude
' + '
' + '

PROPOSAL PREVIEW

' + $json.proposalHtml + '
' + '
' + '

Knowlogix Proposal Pipeline

' }}
